info.title: Angles API
info.description: The API allows the various clients to manage their test results for the Angles Dashboard.

tags.name: Phase
tags.description: API for managing the test phases for the various builds

requestBody.description: Team that we want to create

get.summary: Get all teams for the dashboard in system

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: ID of team that we want to find

get.summary: Get team with given ID

requestBody.description: Team with new values of properties

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: ID of team that we want to add components to.

put.summary: Adds components to the components array for team with given ID

requestBody.description: Components you want to add to the team with the given ID.

200.description: New components were added to the team.

post.summary: Create new environment for the dashboard

requestBody.description: Environment that we want to create

get.summary: Get all environments for the dashboard in system

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: ID of environment that we want to find

get.summary: Get environment with given ID

post.summary: Create new test phase for the dashboard

requestBody.description: Phase that we want to create

get.summary: Get all test phases for the dashboard in system

parameters.name: phaseId
parameters.description: ID of test phase that we want to find

get.summary: Get test phase with given ID

requestBody.description: Request to update the phase. Please provide either a name and/or orderNumber.

post.summary: Create new build for the dashboard

requestBody.description: Build that we want to create

get.summary: Get all builds for the dashboard

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: ID of team that we want to retrieve the builds for.

parameters.name: buildIds
parameters.description: IDs of builds that we want to retrieve, comma separated.

parameters.name: environmentIds
parameters.description: IDs of the environment you want to filter by, comma seperated.

parameters.name: componentIds
parameters.description: IDs of the component you want to filter by, comma seperated

parameters.name: returnExecutionDetails
parameters.description: Boolean to see if you want the execution details returned as well.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of builds to retrieve

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The builds you want to skip (or offset) in the data base query

200.description: The response contains a count of total builds and contains the returned builds in an array

delete.summary: Will delete multiple builds based on the parameters

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: ID of team that we want to remove builds for

parameters.name: ageInDays
parameters.description: The age in days we want to delete builds for (e.g. older than 30 days)

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: ID of build that we want to find

get.summary: Get build with given ID

requestBody.description: Build with new values of properties

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: ID of build that we want to update the keep value for. This value is used to determine if a build should be cleaned up (or not))

put.summary: Update keep value for build with given ID

200.description: Build is updated with new keep value.

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: ID of build that we want to store the artifacts for.

put.summary: Updates the artifacts array for build with given ID

requestBody.description: Artifacts you want to store with build with the given ID.

200.description: Build is updated with new keep value.

post.summary: Create new execution for a build

get.summary: Get all executions either by ids (comma separated) or by buildId

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: ID of build that we want to retrieve the executions for.

parameters.name: executionIds
parameters.description: IDs of execution that we want to retrieve, comma separated.

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: ID of execution that we want to find

get.summary: Get execution with given ID

requestBody.description: Execution with new values of properties

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: ID of execution that we want to find

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of executions to retrieve

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The executions you want to skip (or offset) in the data base query

get.summary: Get the history for the execution with given ID. This finds the hisory by suite name and title, so these have to be unique as a combination for this test.

200.description: The response contains a count of total executions and contains the returned executions in an array

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: ID of execution you want to store the platforms for.

put.summary: Updates the platforms array for execution with given ID

requestBody.description: Store platforms for execution with ID

200.description: Execution has been updated with platforms

post.summary: Create new screenshot for an execution

tags.description: Tags should be provided as an array with double quotes in a string format e.g. "["tag1","tag2","tag3"]".

get.summary: Get all Screenshots, please provide either a buildId, view (or view with platformId)

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: ID of build that we want to retrieve the screenshots for.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Name of the view you want to find screenshots for.

parameters.name: platformId
parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the platform you want to retrieve the images for.

parameters.name: screenshotIds
parameters.description: Comma seperated list of screenshot ids for the screenshots you want to retrieve.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of screenshots you want to return.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The images you want to skip (or offset) in the data base query

get.summary: Get all view names based on a view search string

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Part of all of the view name you want to find (min 3 characters).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of view names you want to return.

get.summary: Get all tags based on a tag search string

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Part of all of the tag you want to find (min 3 characters).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of view names you want to return.

get.summary: Get all screenshots for a specific view grouped by platform

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Name of the view you want to find screenshots for.

parameters.name: numberOfDays
parameters.description: The number of days in the past you want to return screenshots for.

get.summary: Get all screenshots for a specific tag grouped by view

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Name of the tag you want to find screenshots for.

parameters.name: numberOfDays
parameters.description: The number of days in the past you want to return screenshots for.

parameters.name: screenshotId
parameters.description: ID of screenshot that we want to find

get.summary: Get screenshot with given ID

requestBody.description: Screenshot details to be added to the screenshot e.g. platform, tags

parameters.name: screenshotId
parameters.description: ID of screenshot that we want to find

get.summary: Get screenshot with given ID as a image

parameters.name: screenshotId
parameters.description: ID of screenshot you want to generate the dynamic baseline for

parameters.name: numberOfImagesToCompare
parameters.description: The number of images historically you want to use to generate the dynamic baseline

get.summary: Will generate a baseline image by comparing the last n number of images dependent on the numberOfImagesToCompare value

201.description: Successfully created the dynamic baseline image

500.description: Any error, e.g. not enough images to generate dynamic baseline

parameters.name: screenshotId
parameters.description: ID of screenshot you want to compare against the base

parameters.name: screenshotCompareId
parameters.description: ID of the base screenshot

get.summary: Allows you to compare the screenshot against a previous screenshot

parameters.name: screenshotId
parameters.description: ID of screenshot you want to compare against the base

parameters.name: screenshotCompareId
parameters.description: ID of the base screenshot

parameters.name: useCache
parameters.description: All compares are stored using the two id's of the images used to compare. By default we will return this cached version unless this flag is set to false (and the compare will be done again)

get.summary: Allows you to compare the screenshot against a previous screenshot and returns the image

200.description: Comparison sucessful and results returned as an image

parameters.name: screenshotId
parameters.description: ID of screenshot you want to compare against the baseline

get.summary: Allows you to compare the screenshot against the baseline

post.summary: Create a new baseline to map for a specific view and deviceName, which image is the baseline.

requestBody.description: Baseline that you want to create.

get.summary: Get all baselines for the dashboard in system (please either provide a deviceName or a browser name). If no deviceName is provide height and width are required to identify the correct baseline.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: The view you want to retrieve the baselines for.

parameters.name: platformName
parameters.description: PlatformName you want to retrieve the baselines for.

parameters.name: deviceName
parameters.description: DeviceName you want to retrieve the baselines for.

parameters.name: browsername
parameters.description: Browsername you wan to retrieve the baselines for.

parameters.name: screenHeight
parameters.description: The screenHeight you want to retrieve baselines for (only required when not providing deviceName)

parameters.name: screenWidth
parameters.description: The screenWidth want to retrieve baselines for (only required when not providing deviceName)

parameters.name: baselineId
parameters.description: ID of baseline that we want to find

get.summary: Get baseline with given ID

requestBody.description: Whilst updating a basline you need to provide at least a new screenshotId or a new array of ignoreBoxes.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: ID of team you want to retrieve metrics for

parameters.name: componentId
parameters.description: ID of component you want to retrieve metrics for

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Start of the date range [e.g. YYYY-MM-DD].

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End of the date range [e.g. YYYY-MM-DD]

get.summary: Gets metrics grouped by test phase

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Part of all of the view you want to retrieve metrics for

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Part of all of the tag(s) you want to retrieve metrics for

parameters.name: thumbnail
parameters.description: Boolean value if you want to include the latest thumbnail in the response

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of top view and tags you want to return.

get.summary: Gets metrics grouped by tags and views
Get versions for current Angles instance

200.description: Returns the versions of the Angles backend components
